name: Apple Delight Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Apples, cooked (or more for larger pies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cooked apples, sweetened and spiced to taste, into a pie dish.
2. Mix together by hand the flour, sugar, and margarine, leaving the mixture chunky.
3. Sprinkle the mixture over the apples.
4. Bake at 350°F until golden brown.
